description: Plan US National Park Service trips — parks, alerts, campgrounds, things to do, events.
name: io.github.cyanheads/national-parks-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: NPS Data API key, sent as the X-Api-Key header. Required — the server fails to start without it. Free instant signup at https://www.nps.gov/subjects/developer/get-started.htm.
environmentVariables.name: NPS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: NPS Data API base URL override (testing / proxy). Defaults to https://developer.nps.gov/api/v1.
environmentVariables.name: NPS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
